sourcesContent:
// In ConditionNode.js, update the display section {/* Display current input values */}
Current Inputs:
Input A:
{nodeState.inputA !== null ? nodeState.inputA : '∅'}
Input B:
{nodeState.inputB !== null ? nodeState.inputB : '∅'}
{nodeState.result !== null && (
Result: {nodeState.inputA} {nodeState.operator} {nodeState.inputB} = {nodeState.result.toString().toUpperCase()}
)}
